implementation_summary.summary: CP00-693 closes the RP22 External Integrations I P09 synthetic fixture, test/golden, Hermes evidence, Claude review, and closeout handoff bridge over 84 planned units from RP22.P09.M06.S09 through RP22.P09.M10.S10 while keeping workflow, permission, audit, fixture, security, UI, review, Hermes, persistence, and command runtimes closed before the RP23 handoff.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-693 RP22.P09.M06.S09-RP22.P09.M10.S10 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
